title: Evolution Fine-Tuning: Learning to Discover Across 371 Optimization Tasks
innovation_summary: Evolution Fine-Tuning: Learning to Discover Across 371 Optimization Tasks: To address this, we introduce Evolution Fine-Tuning (EFT), a mid-training paradigm that teaches LLMs to evolve solutions across tasks by converting evolutionary search trajectories into supervision.
